author: dashboard-bootstrap
content:
Shipped in d3e7772c. configure_signing is now role-aware:

• AgentRole::Driver workspaces → hub-cache user.signingkey = driver's main-repo user.signingkey (the human's GitHub-registered key). Commits verify end-to-end on GitHub.
• AgentRole::Agent worktrees (kickoff/swarm subagents) → hub-cache signs with agent's own SSH key. Distinct attribution; local verification via allowed_signers.

Other changes:
• crosslink agent init gained --role <driver|agent> (default 'agent' preserves kickoff behavior; dashboard retrofit passes --role driver explicitly).
• configure_signing now runs unconditionally after key-gen (previously nested inside the Ok(keypair) arm, so --force on existing-key workspaces was a no-op).
• Fixed /home/doll/crosslink/.crosslink/agent.json.role from 'agent' to 'driver'; re-ran agent init; hub-cache user.signingkey flipped from dashboard-bootstrap key to /home/doll/.ssh/id_ecdsa_signing (the driver's ED25519 key — filename is misleading, contents are ED25519 with fingerprint 6GbEO9g...).
• New sync commit 9834eb7a verifies as 'Good git signature for driver@crosslink'.

Past hub commits on origin signed with the dashboard-bootstrap key will remain unverified on GitHub unless the user adds that pub key as a signing key there. Flagged to the user.
